metadata.description: Cowork Business OS — a working operating system for running your business inside the Claude Desktop app. Core plugin plus PRIMA add-ons for project management, session memory, and academic research.

plugins.name: cowork-business-os
plugins.description: Core content skills plus the workspace scaffolder. Required for prima-project-management.

plugins.name: prima-project-management
plugins.description: Project and client state lifecycle, session commands, milestone and task tracking.

plugins.name: prima-memory
plugins.description: Searchable session history via bundled MCP server.

plugins.name: prima-scholar
plugins.description: Academic research workflow with bundled MCP servers for PubMed, arXiv, Semantic Scholar, CrossRef.
